title: To designate the Maine Forest and Logging Museum, located in Bradley, Maine, as the National Museum of Forestry and Logging History.
plain_summary: This bill renames the Maine Forest and Logging Museum to the National Museum of Forestry and Logging History. The museum is located in Bradley, Maine. After this bill passes, the government will use the new name in all official papers and documents when talking about the museum. This gives the museum a more important-sounding national title instead of just being called a state museum.
last_action_text: Referred to the Subcommittee on Forestry and Horticulture.

sections.title: Section 1. National Museum of Forestry and Logging History
sections.text: The Maine Forest and Logging Museum in Bradley, Maine will now be called the National Museum of Forestry and Logging History. Whenever any federal law, map, rule, document, record, or other official paper mentions that museum, it will be considered a reference to the National Museum of Forestry and Logging History.
